---
name: Bug report
about: Report inaccurate, broken, or incomplete cross-repository documentation
title: '[Docs Bug] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the documentation defect clearly.

## Affected area

- Architecture
- Operations
- Guide
- Broken link or structure

## Current behavior

What is inaccurate or broken now?

## Expected behavior

What should the documentation say or link to instead?

## Evidence or source of truth

Link the repository, workflow, or runtime behavior that proves the correction.

## Impact

- [ ] Misleads delivery or operations
- [ ] Misstates current architecture or topology
- [ ] Contains broken links or invalid structure
- [ ] Requires coordinated updates in repository-local docs

## Notes

Add source-of-truth references or follow-up context here.
